summary: Comprehensive bug fix verification completed for FREE11. All reported bugs have been FIXED: chat button works on mobile (opens slide-up modal), room codes are generated for ALL card game rooms, share buttons are properly contained, and no text visibility issues found. 21/21 backend tests passed. Frontend fully functional.

details: Teen Patti rooms now have room_code generated
Rummy rooms now have room_code generated
Poker rooms now have room_code generated
Quick play rooms also get room_code

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Chat button not working on mobile
bugs_verified_fixed.verification: Chat toggle opens slide-up modal on mobile with 'Game Chat' title, input field, and close button

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Room codes missing for card games
bugs_verified_fixed.verification: All card game rooms (Rummy, Teen Patti, Poker) now generate 6-character room codes

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Share button overflow on InviteFriends page
bugs_verified_fixed.verification: Mobile test confirms buttons are properly contained (x+width < viewport_width)
3 share buttons (WhatsApp, Share, Copy Link) found and properly contained in game room
All pages have good text contrast (white/yellow/green text on dark backgrounds)

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with all sections visible
Cricket page with ball-by-ball predictions working
Card Games page showing Rummy, Teen Patti, Poker
Game Room with WebSocket connection working
Mobile chat modal opens and closes properly (BUG FIXED)
Share buttons in GameRoom properly contained
Invite Friends page with referral link and share buttons
Share buttons on Invite Friends page not overflowing (BUG FIXED)
Profile page with user info and stats
Room code generation for all card game types (BUG FIXED)
critical_code_review_comments: Fantasy page uses MOCK data when API fails (404) - working as intended per mocked_api note
WebSocket connection has initial failure then reconnects - this is handled gracefully
React hook dependency warnings in console (non-blocking)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages loading, all reported bugs verified fixed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All reported bugs have been verified as fixed. Chat modal works on mobile via slide-up animation. Room codes are now generated for ALL card game rooms (not just private). Share buttons are properly contained on both InviteFriends and GameRoom pages. Fantasy uses mock data when API fails which is expected behavior. WebSocket connections work after initial reconnection.
mocked_apis_note: Fantasy player/contest data uses MOCK data when API fails (404) - this is expected per the mocked_api configuration. Cricket matches data also uses mock when needed.
